message:
feat(engine): comprehensive test enrichment across 23 core modules

Concurrent agent sweep adding edge-case, serde roundtrip, Display/Error trait,
and boundary-condition test coverage to existing engine modules. Total: ~5000
lines of test additions across 23 source files.

Modules enriched (lines added):

Scheduling & Resource Management:
- bulkhead.rs (+274): queue depth defaults per class, pressure thresholds,
  double-release prevention, multi-bulkhead snapshot, 100% threshold boundary
- scheduler_lane.rs (+359): TaskType Display uniqueness (12 variants), TaskId
  formatting, LaneConfig defaults, monotonic IDs, timed deadline edge cases
- monitor_scheduler.rs (+215): queue depth, task prioritization, timeout handling
- supervision.rs (+177): task lifecycle monitoring, policy enforcement

Security & Cryptography:
- capability.rs (+177): intersection edge cases, profile membership (16 caps),
  subsumption transitivity, require_all empty/denial paths
- capability_token.rs (+213): serial monotonicity, expiration boundaries,
  revocation transitions, full serde roundtrip
- sorted_multisig.rs (+368): single-entry arrays, insert ordering, quorum
  threshold matching, signature verification with auth lists
- key_derivation.rs (+314): DerivationContext edge cases (nul separators,
  overwrites), output length boundaries (1-256 bytes), epoch-based derivation
- eprocess_guardrail.rs (+293): capability intersection, revocation cascading,
  Display uniqueness (11+ variants), permission leak detection

Evidence & Verification:
- evidence_contract.rs (+232): field presence validation, replay command parsing,
  artifact metadata consistency, evidence entry linking
- proof_release_gate.rs (+331): bundle field validation (empty strings, zero
  timestamps), fallback path validation, replay multiplier boundaries
- quarantine_mesh_gate.rs (+329): FaultType ordering/serde (5 variants),
  scenario events with fault tracing, benign scenario latency
- recovery_artifact.rs (+213): ArtifactType Display (7 variants), ProofElement
  Display (4 variants), store operations, epoch validation
- entropy_evidence_compressor.rs (+228): compression ratio edge cases,
  evidence reconstruction, metadata sync, state machine transitions

Runtime & Lifecycle:
- extension_host_lifecycle.rs (+215): error code uniqueness (8 variants),
  full serde coverage, session management, state transitions
- lab_runtime.rs (+252): VirtualClock edge cases, task ID monotonicity,
  multi-task sequencing, state transitions, replay/checkpoint
- region_lifecycle.rs (+181): RegionState Display (5 variants), CancelReason
  Display (6 variants), PhaseOrderViolation Error + serde
- phase_gate.rs (+179): phase ordering, state machine correctness, timeouts

Policy & Scoring:
- policy_controller.rs (+215): initialization, config accessors, posterior
  probability queries, loss matrix operations, guardrail exemptions
- northstar_scorecard.rs (+192): score normalization, rank uniqueness,
  percentile buckets, metadata enrichment
- obligation_leak_policy.rs (+179): obligation tracking, leak detection
  thresholds, cleanup propagation, violation recovery
- regime_detector.rs (+126): negative observation classification, epoch
  updates with events, multi-stream aggregation, DetectorConfig serde
- spectral_fleet_convergence.rs (+203): convergence metrics, byzantine node
  identification, fleet state consistency, gossip delivery

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
